title: Marina nutans

intro: Marina nutans, also known as the Sea Holly or Marina nutans, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, offering various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Marina nutans is rich in bioactive constituents, such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
